item.title: Unlinked_Pages
item.description: Unlinked Notes README Knee slice Double ankle grab pass Closed guard figure 8 Leg drag Toreando Double under Closed guard standing up Cross collar grip break to takedown Grip break on upper back Collar grip break downward Baseball choke Straight ankle lock Close guard overhook stiff Two grip choke o...

item.title: Empty_Pages
item.description: Empty Notes Gogoplata Kimura Canto choke North south Figure-four grip Rubber guard De La Riva sweep Double leg .

item.title: Recently_Updated
item.description: Recently Updated Notes index Lockdown Sweep Lumberjack & Waiter Omoplata Star sweep Sweep Collar & Sleeve to takedown Fireman throw Arm drag Double leg .

item.title: Lapel
item.description: General Usually in clothing the lapel is the “chest” area, but in BJJ it is referring to the end of the clothing below the belt.

item.title: Sleeve
item.description: General Sleeves are essential part of many grips and holds and they give superior pulling capabilities.

item.title: BJJ journey
item.description: Process Overall process is loosely based on Zettelkasten methodology, which has been changed to suit my tracking of BJJ journey.

item.title: README
item.description: Obsidian_BJJ Obsidian repository for BJJ notes.

item.title: X guards
item.description: Description Quite vague concept having the legs form a “X” shape while controlling the opponents leg(s).

item.title: Ankle-Waist-Shin
item.description: General This is often named or described as “basic” sweep, and rather than have it be extremely well defined it is more related to the broad concept.
